ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a thin line between the title and content.
ast.target: 在标题和内容之间显示一条细线。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Gap between title and content in pixels (0 = default).
ast.target: 标题与内容之间的间距（像素，0 = 默认）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the colored header accent behind the title.
ast.target: 在标题后显示彩色的头部强调色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Inner padding in pixels (0 = default). Negative values allowed.
ast.target: 内部填充（像素，0 = 默认）。允许负值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the body background. Turn off to let the block blend into the page.
ast.target: 显示主体背景。关闭可让区块融入页面。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 主体背景透明度（100 = 完全不透明）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Blur behind the body (only visible when opacity < 100).
ast.target: 主体背后的模糊效果（仅当透明度 < 100 时可见）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 为头部、主体和边框着色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the border and hover highlight.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 边框粗细（像素，0 = 默认）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Corner rounding in pixels (0 = theme default).
ast.target: 圆角半径（像素，0 = 主题默认）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use different startup settings on mobile devices — for example, open the homepage on startup only on desktop. Independent of the layout responsive mode below.
ast.target: 在移动设备上使用不同的启动设置——例如，仅在桌面端启动时打开主页。与下方的布局响应模式无关。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open the homepage when Obsidian starts.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: What to do with existing tabs on startup.
ast.target: 启动时如何处理现有标签页。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open the homepage when all tabs are closed.
ast.target: 当所有标签页关闭时打开主页。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: What to do with existing tabs when you open the homepage manually.
ast.target: 手动打开主页时如何处理现有标签页。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Prevent the homepage tab from being closed.
ast.target: 防止主页标签页被关闭。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Unified: one layout for all screen sizes. Separate: different layouts for desktop and mobile.
ast.target: 统一：所有屏幕尺寸使用同一布局。分离：桌面和移动端使用不同布局。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of grid columns on mobile.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Overwrite the mobile layout with a copy of the desktop layout, fitted to mobile columns.
ast.target: 用桌面布局的副本覆盖移动端布局，并适配移动端列数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the scrollbar on the homepage. You can still scroll when hidden.
ast.target: 在主页上显示滚动条。隐藏时仍可滚动。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Remove vertical gaps between blocks. Turn off to allow free placement with gaps.
ast.target: 移除区块之间的垂直间距。关闭可允许自由放置并保留间距。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Subtly lift blocks on mouseover and reveal the collapse toggle.
ast.target: 鼠标悬停时轻微抬起区块并显示折叠开关。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Restore all blocks to the default layout. This can’t be undone.
ast.target: 将所有区块恢复为默认布局。此操作无法撤销。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Copy the layout to your clipboard as JSON.
ast.target: 将布局以 JSON 格式复制到剪贴板。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Paste an exported layout JSON to restore it.
ast.target: 粘贴导出的布局 JSON 以恢复布局。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Auto: language preset. Custom: write your own for each time slot.
ast.target: 自动：语言预设。自定义：为每个时间段编写自己的内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Auto: based on time of day. Custom: one per time slot. Random: picked from a pool.
ast.target: 自动：基于一天中的时间。自定义：每个时间段一个。随机：从池中随机选取。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pick one at midnight, keep it all day.
ast.target: 午夜时选取一个，全天保持不变。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Moment.js format string. Leave blank for default.
ast.target: Moment.js 格式字符串。留空则使用默认值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: From tagged notes, or entered manually.
ast.target: 来自带标签的笔记，或手动输入。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display the note filename as the quote attribution.
ast.target: 将笔记文件名显示为引文出处。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Separate quotes with --- on its own line, then add a source with — (e.g. — author).
ast.target: 用单独一行的 --- 分隔引文，然后用 — 添加来源（例如 — 作者）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Leave empty for all. Set to 1 for a daily rotating quote.
ast.target: 留空则显示全部。设置为 1 则每日轮换引文。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Same quote all day, changes at midnight.
ast.target: 全天显示同一引文，午夜更换。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Scroll keeps the block compact. Grow to fit expands to show all quotes.
ast.target: 滚动保持区块紧凑。增长以适应则展开显示所有引文。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Classic: left accent bar. Centered: single column. Card: each quote in its own box.
ast.target: 经典：左侧强调条。居中：单列。卡片：每条引文在独立的框中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the vertical line next to each quote.
ast.target: 在每条引文旁显示垂直线。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 区块内的垂直对齐方式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Font preset. A custom font below will override this (line-height still applies).
ast.target: 字体预设。下方的自定义字体将覆盖此设置（行高仍适用）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Any installed font. Overrides the preset above.
ast.target: 任何已安装的字体。覆盖上方的预设。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 选择一个保险库文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Auto: expands to fit all images. Fixed: uses the block's row height and scrolls.
ast.target: 自动：展开以适应所有图片。固定：使用区块的行高并滚动。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Scroll keeps the block compact. Grow to fit expands the card to show the full note.
ast.target: 滚动保持区块紧凑。增长以适应则展开卡片以显示完整笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Auto: expands to fit content. Fixed: uses grid cell height with scrollbar.
ast.target: 自动：展开以适应内容。固定：使用网格单元格高度并带滚动条。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Supports full HTML documents with <style> blocks.
ast.target: 支持包含 <style> 块的完整 HTML 文档。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Paste a video or playlist link from any supported platform.
ast.target: 粘贴来自任何支持平台的视频或播放列表链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Start at a random video each time the homepage opens. Only works with playlists.
ast.target: 每次打开主页时从随机视频开始。仅适用于播放列表。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show relative time next to each file.
ast.target: 在每个文件旁显示相对时间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 逗号分隔的要排除的文件夹路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 每个工作时段的分钟数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Work sessions before a long break.
ast.target: 长休息前的工作时段数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Play a sound when a phase ends.

ast.source: Only notes with this tag will appear.
ast.target: 仅显示带有此标签的笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Same note all day, changes at midnight.
ast.target: 全天显示同一笔记，午夜更换。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Frontmatter property with the image path.
ast.target: 包含图片路径的 Frontmatter 属性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Frontmatter property for the title. Falls back to filename.
ast.target: 用于标题的 Frontmatter 属性。回退到文件名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the first paragraph or frontmatter description.
ast.target: 显示第一段或 Frontmatter 描述。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 新语音笔记的存放位置。留空则为保险库根目录。

ast.target: 麦克风按钮如何开始录音。

ast.source: Language code (en, it, fr). Leave blank to auto-detect.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional. Use {{transcript}} where the text should appear.
ast.target: 可选。在文本应出现的位置使用 {{transcript}}。

ast.target: 搜索框为空时显示的文本。

ast.target: 需要 API 密钥 — 请在区块设置中配置

ast.name: text
ast.source: Overrides the solid background when both colors are set.
ast.target: 当两种颜色都设置时，覆盖纯色背景。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This block has no content settings.

ast.name: text
ast.source: Click to add emoji. Remove by clicking the ✕ on each.
ast.target: 点击添加表情符号。点击每个表情符号上的 ✕ 可将其移除。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Vault root listing is not supported. Select a subfolder.
ast.target: 不支持列出保险库根目录。请选择一个子文件夹。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No links yet. Add manual links or pick a folder in settings.
ast.target: 暂无链接。请在设置中添加手动链接或选择一个文件夹。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No items yet. Add buttons with emojis and labels in settings.
ast.target: 暂无项目。请在设置中添加带有表情符号和标签的按钮。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No tag configured. Add a tag in settings to show a daily rotating note.
ast.target: 未配置标签。请在设置中添加一个标签以显示每日轮换的笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No tag configured. Add a tag in settings to pull quotes from your notes.
ast.target: 未配置标签。请在设置中添加一个标签以从您的笔记中提取引文。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No quotes yet. Add them in settings, separated by ---.
ast.target: 暂无引文。请在设置中添加它们，用 --- 分隔。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No folder selected. Pick an image folder in settings to display a gallery.
ast.target: 未选择文件夹。请在设置中选择一个图片文件夹以显示图库。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No note selected. Choose a file path in settings to embed it here.
ast.target: 未选择笔记。请在设置中选择一个文件路径以在此处嵌入它。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No content yet. Click the pencil icon to add text.
ast.target: 暂无内容。点击铅笔图标添加文本。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No HTML content yet. Add your markup in settings.
ast.target: 暂无 HTML 内容。请在设置中添加您的标记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No video URL. Paste a YouTube, Vimeo, or Dailymotion link in settings.
ast.target: 无视频链接。请在设置中粘贴 YouTube、Vimeo 或 Dailymotion 链接。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No bookmarks yet. Add links in settings.
ast.target: 暂无书签。请在设置中添加链接。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No tag configured. Add a tag in settings to show random notes.
ast.target: 未配置标签。请在设置中添加一个标签以显示随机笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This confirmation is remembered per provider — you will not see it again for this provider.
ast.target: 此确认信息会针对每个提供者单独记忆——您将不会再次看到此提供者的此提示。
